changes: Synced with latest upstream SunnyPilot changes
On-device MICI vehicle selector with support for all makes|C4
Flat and arched powerflow meter style options with large/small sizes|C3X
BluePilot and SunnyPilot BSM can now be toggled separately
Enhanced ACC coasting behavior with option to disable downhill assist for vehicles that handle it natively
Auto lane change now disables under a specified speed instead of fully disabling lateral control
Improved chevron rendering with better outline overlap prevention
Improved radar overlay with cleaner visuals and centered messages to prevent truncation
Onroad performance: Cached per-frame Params reads to reduce video stutter
Enabled additional GPS signals for better location lock
Preferred WiFi network selector for MICI devices|C4
Pill alerts moved to bottom of display with increased sizes
Organized C3X settings menu|C3X
Renamed Hands Free UI option to BlueCruise Dash Icon
Ford: Added Ford Edge MK2 to vehicle menu and fingerprints
Ford: Block BlueCruise hands-free message on CAN vehicles
Ford ICBM: Multiple improvements to speed target handling and button detection
fixes: Fixed TICI screen dimming behavior|C3X
Fixed stale scons lock file on boot
Fixed confidence ball display in reverse and speedometer hiding
Fixed MICI powerflow style toggle and menu consistency|C4
Fixed broken MICI float button behavior|C4
Fixed MICI blindspot description|C4
Fixed driver monitoring and battery stat widget display
Fixed sidebar and recent changes panel crashes|C3X
Fixed broken items from SunnyPilot sync including controlStateBP
Fixed WiFi manager with upstream sync and improved error handling
Synced onroad brightness timeout logic with upstream SunnyPilot
Ford ICBM: Fixed initial cruise speed capture, button timers, and PCM initialization
Ford ICBM-SLA: Fixed button detection for ICBM vehicles
General stability improvements and UI crash prevention
removals: Removed orphan parameters and unused logic

changes: All of the latest upstream SunnyPilot changes
BluePilot Portal: New React-based Progressive Web App (PWA) for device management
BluePilot Portal: Home Dashboard with system status, drive stats, and disk space visualization
BluePilot Portal: Routes Management with video playback, GPS maps, and camera exports
BluePilot Portal: Settings Panel for configuring all parameters from browser with WebSocket updates
BluePilot Portal: Diagnostics Panel with real-time TMUX streaming and parameter browser
New BluePilot sidebar with WiFi status display and improved network information
Enhanced Onroad UI: Improved lane lines, road edges, and path rendering with glow effects and smoother curve tracking
Completely redesigned settings menu with reorganized panels for better navigation
New Software Panel with integrated updater, branch management, and model selection
Added Routes Panel with video playback support (beta) for viewing dashcam footage
Model info widget and enhanced drive stats widget for onroad display
Developer UI: New customizable debug panel with adjustable settings
Brightness control system with perceptual brightness correction for better viewing
Enhanced overlay system: Refactored HUD rendering for better performance and modularity
Brake status indicator: Now uses brake light CAN signal when available for more accurate display
Network Panel: WiFi management with connection status, signal strength, and SSID detection
Crash detection hooks: Better error reporting and stacktrace collection for debugging
Added option to bypass BluePilot lateral controls for testing purposes
Onroad display behavior controls: dimming percentage and timeout settings
OSM Panel: OpenStreetMap integration improvements
Models Panel: Easy switching between different driving models
Ford: Human Turn Detection latch increased to 3.0 seconds for better turn handling
Ford: Improved EPAS wind-up prevention during human turns
Ford: Better yaw threshold handling at 12.5 m/s
fixes: Fixed BPSelection control description text display in settings
Fixed radar overlay speed unit matching with system settings
Fixed BP Updater crashes on built branches without submodules
Fixed HybridDriveBatteryGauge calculations for more accurate battery percentage display
Fixed hybrid gauge scaling when sidebar is visible
Fixed sunnylink card display issues in sidebar
Fixed onroad debug panel width utilization for better screen usage
Fixed brightness control system interactions and perceptual brightness
Fixed menu system JSON parsing and control visibility conditions
Fixed WiFi SSID detection and display in sidebar
Fixed stop sign overlay positioning and rendering
Fixed lane line mapping using model transform for better accuracy
Improved thread safety and exception handling in sidebar rendering
Fixed alert overlay styling to match the rest of the UI
General stability improvements and bug fixes throughout the UI
Fixed web server crash on first enable by installing dependencies in background
Fixed WiFi connection handling to check for known connections before prompting for passwords
Ford: Fixed blocked messages after human turn reset
Ford: Fixed message blocking issues during speed transitions in panda safety
Ford: Fixed Ford Escape MK4.5 naming (ESCAPE_MK5 to ESCAPE_MK4_5)
removals: Removed the GForce Meter from the HUD (overlay system replaced it)
Removed quiet mode feature from menus
Removed constant fan animation from sidebar (now shows memory only)

changes: Added this recent changes dialog functionality to offroad transition in UI
Added the fan demand percentage to the sidebar.  Just tap on the memory card to toggle it
Enhanced stop sign detection and rendering with improved vehicle state checks and visual effects
Refactored HybridDriveGauge and HybridBatteryGauge with enhanced automotive styling
Added a new GForceMeter to the HUD
Enhanced stop sign rendering with improved position and size smoothing
Refactored lead tracking logic with enhanced stability requirements
Complete rewrite of advanced lateral control.  In-lane position is now handle stand-alone and is smoother
Updates to lateral control logic to incorporate dynamic lag calculation
Reset low speed torque limits to match bp-2.1
Updated 'steering limited exceeded' warning logic to reduce false alerts
Added a new parameter to control the speed color when the brake is pressed
Added restriction to the calibration that require the car to have 2 valid lane lines before starting the calibration
Latest Upstream SunnyPilot changes
fixes: Fixed compilation errors in BluePilot UI components
Performance improvements to hopefully fix the random UI restarts
Enhanced stop detection and rendering with improved data validation
Latest Upstream SunnyPilot fixes
removals: Disabled routes panel for now until we get FFMpeg hardware decoding working then it will be added back and allow for video playback like a dashcam
